data.content:
Implementation complete on branch `foolery-1901` (commit 9906897f302b).

**Root cause**: `toBeat()` in `knots-backend.ts` never extracted acceptance criteria from tagged notes back into `beat.acceptance`. Acceptance was written as notes with `Acceptance Criteria:\n` prefix by `create()` and `update()`, but `stringifyNotes()` included them in visible `beat.notes` without filtering.

**Fix**: Added `ACCEPTANCE_MARKER` constant, `isAcceptanceNote()` predicate, and `extractAcceptanceFromNotes()` helper (latest-note-wins semantics). `stringifyNotes()` now filters out acceptance-tagged notes. Both `toBeat()` return paths now populate `beat.acceptance`. Write paths in `create()` and `update()` use the centralized marker constant.

**Tests**: 5 new tests in `knots-backend-coverage.test.ts` covering: acceptance round-trip, exclusion from notes, multiple acceptance notes (latest wins), no acceptance notes, and empty acceptance body. All 2157 tests pass. Lint, typecheck, and build all clean.

**Files changed**: `src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts`, `src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-coverage.test.ts`
